graph_operations.content: When the sentence contains 'principal amount of $X' or 'face value of $X' or 'aggregate principal', tag as DebtInstrumentFaceAmount. Use DebtInstrumentCarryingAmount only when the text explicitly discusses book value after unamortized discount/premium adjustments.

Confusing DebtInstrumentFaceAmount with DebtInstrumentCarryingAmount. Face amount is the stated principal; carrying amount includes unamortized discount/premium. The model defaults to FaceAmount even when the text discusses book value after discount amortization.
